events.label: reasoning
events.text: {"decision":"fail","risk":"critical","work_stage":"rough-complete","component_conditions":["installed-defective","non-compliant"],"percent_complete":70,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.9,"event_time":0,"rate":0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Primary and secondary conductors landed reversed on transformer, creating overvoltage/undervoltage hazard and potential equipment damage","Reversed primary/secondary landing violates manufacturer wiring requirements and NEC Art. 450 installation requirements","Bonding/grounding per NEC 250.30 cannot be verified correct with reversed connections"],"actions":["De-energize and lockout/tagout the transformer","Re-land primary and secondary conductors per transformer nameplate and manufacturer wiring diagram","Verify correct voltage ratio and phasing before re-energizing","Confirm grounding and bonding per NEC 250.30 after correction","Re-inspect before closeout"],"rationale":"Primary/secondary landed reversed is a serious installation defect that would apply wrong voltage to loads and the transformer itself, violating manufacturer requirements and NEC Art. 450; grounding/bonding per 250.30 cannot be assured until corrected.","references":["NEC Art. 450","NEC 250.30"]}
